## Problem

What operational problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest change that would help.

## Why This Fits The Project

Explain why the request belongs in a narrow WARP AI watchdog instead of a
general proxy manager.

## Validation Idea

How should the change be verified?
